items.title: Norms and distances build on vector spaces
items.description: Norms, distances and angles are defined on vector spaces. You need a clear picture of vectors, span and subspaces before introducing metrics and geometry.

items.title: PCA as subspace selection
items.description: Principal component analysis chooses a small set of basis vectors that span a low-dimensional subspace capturing most of the data variance.

items.title: Embedding visualization from vector spaces
items.description: t-SNE and UMAP often start from high-dimensional vector spaces of embeddings and project them into 2D or 3D for visualization.
